## Detected Apps

[{"DisplayName": "Google Chrome", "Version": "121.0.6167.85", "Publisher": "Google LLC", "DeviceCount": 342}, {"DisplayName": "Notepad++", "Version": "8.6.2", "Publisher": "Notepad++ Team", "DeviceCount": 187}, {"DisplayName": "Microsoft Visual C++ 2019 Redistributable", "Version": "14.29.30133", "Publisher": "Microsoft Corporation", "DeviceCount": 298}]

Classify each detected app.

classifications.reason: Matches managed Win32 deployment. Chrome has no kernel drivers or COM dependencies, making it a strong MSIX conversion candidate. Google also provides MSIX-compatible installers.
Installed on 187 devices but not present in the managed app inventory. Likely user-installed or deployed via a legacy method. Should be evaluated for Intune onboarding or removal.
Runtime dependency commonly deployed as a prerequisite for other applications. Present across most managed devices as expected.
